ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the board meeting */,
  "total_directors" INTEGER /* Total number of directors associated as of the meeting date */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of meeting (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "agenda_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agenda for the meeting */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "meeting_status" TEXT /* Status of the meeting (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "directors_attended" INTEGER /* Number of directors who attended the meeting */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of directors who attended the meeting */,
  "apologies" INTEGER /* Number of directors who apologized for absence */,
  "proxy_directors" INTEGER /* Number of proxy directors attending the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the director started serving on the board */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the director ended serving on the board (if applicable) */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder associated with the director */,
  "director_type" TEXT /* Type of director (e.g., executive, non-executive) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "shareholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the shareholder */,
  "share_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of shares held by the shareholder */,
  "shareholder_type" TEXT /* Type of shareholder (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minutes" (
  "minute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of meeting minutes */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "minute_file" TEXT /* File path to the meeting minutes document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the minutes were uploaded */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the minutes were approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minutes_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting during which the resolution was passed */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text of the resolution */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* Result of the vote on the resolution */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution was voted on */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., passed, rejected, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director receiving the notification */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the notification pertains to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., meeting reminder, agenda change) */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the document pertains to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., agenda, presentation) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., uploaded, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agendas" (
  "agenda_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agenda */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "agenda_date" TEXT /* Date the agenda was created */,
  "agenda_items" TEXT /* List of items on the agenda */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agenda_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agendas_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director casting the vote */,
  "vote_cast" TEXT /* Vote cast by the director (e.g., for, against, abstain) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)
